message:
chore: replace path deps with crates.io versions

Removed /dp/ path deps for asupersync, fastmcp-*, sqlmodel-*, beads_rust,
and tru. These are now pulled from crates.io at their published versions.

Retained ftui patch overrides until ftui v0.2.2 is published (local code
uses APIs not yet in the published v0.2.1).

Also fixed const fn issue in named_config_for_theme_id (called non-const
theme_id_env_value).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
